seoTitle: How to Share Typeform Results With Your Team
metaDescription: Learn how to view, export, and share Typeform response data with teammates and clients while managing access and data privacy.
intro: Once responses start coming in, getting that data to the right people matters as much as collecting it. This guide covers how to view and analyze Typeform results, share them with your team or clients, export the data, and control who has access to it.

steps.heading: Open the Results section
steps.body: Go to the Results tab for your form to see an overview of submissions and response summaries.

steps.heading: View and analyze responses
steps.body: Look through individual responses and summary insights to understand trends and patterns in what people submitted.

steps.heading: Share results with your team
steps.body: Use Typeform's sharing options to give teammates or stakeholders access to view the results without needing to share your full account.

steps.heading: Export and manage permissions
steps.body: Export response data when needed for external reporting, and set permission levels to control who can view or edit results.

faq.question: Can I export Typeform results to a file?
faq.answer: Yes, Typeform allows you to export response data so it can be used in external reports or other tools.

faq.question: How do I control who can see my form's results?
faq.answer: Typeform's permission settings let you manage which team members or collaborators have access to view results and analytics.

faq.question: Can clients view results without a Typeform account?
faq.answer: Depending on the sharing option used, you can share summarized results externally, though full account access still requires appropriate permissions.

faq.question: Is response data kept private by default?
faq.answer: Typeform gives you control over sharing and permissions, so results aren't automatically public and access should be managed deliberately.
